name: moveFile
description: Moves a file or folder to a different Drive folder. By default adds the new parent while keeping existing parents; set removeFromAllParents=true for a true move.

fileId.description: The file or folder ID from a Google Drive URL or a previous tool result.

newParentId.description: ID of the destination folder. Use "root" for Drive root.

removeFromAllParents.description: If true, removes from all current parents. If false, adds to new parent while keeping existing parents.
